citation_label: CRA Form NL479 2025 Newfoundland and Labrador Credits
heading: CRA Form NL479 2025 Newfoundland and Labrador Credits
body:
Title: CRA Form NL479 2025 Newfoundland and Labrador credits.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5001-tc/5001-tc-25e.txt
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5001-tc/5001-tc-25e.pdf

NL479 numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 2000
Value: 0.174

CRA Form NL479 2025 calculates Newfoundland and Labrador refundable credits. Lines 1 to 5 calculate physical activity expenses by adding eligible family physical activity expenses, subtracting assistance received or receivable, capping line 3 at $2,000, and subtracting any amount claimed by other eligible individuals. Line 6 gives the applicable rate as 17.4%. Line 7 multiplies line 5 by 17.4% to calculate the physical activity tax credit. Line 8 takes the research and development tax credit from line 6 of Form T1129. Line 9 adds line 7 and line 8 and enters Newfoundland and Labrador credits on T1 line 47900.

metadata.title: CRA Form NL479 2025 Newfoundland and Labrador Credits
